name: Selfreliance
description_short: Selfreliance Federal Credit Union offers checking, savings, auto loans, mortgages, and credit cards with competitive rates and access to 85,000+ fee-free ATMs nationwide.
description_long:
Selfreliance Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative that provides comprehensive banking and lending services. The institution operates as a federally chartered credit union, positioning itself as an alternative to traditional banks with member-focused benefits.

The credit union offers a full suite of consumer financial products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, auto loans, mortgages, commercial truck loans, and credit cards. Their current rates include auto loans as low as 4.69% APR, mortgages starting at 5.25% APR, credit cards at 9.90% APR, and money market accounts yielding up to 3.29% APY. They specifically advertise a 10% down mortgage option with no PMI for first-time homebuyers and offer one-time free rate adjustments if rates drop.

A key distinction is their ATM network access: Selfreliance claims to provide more than 85,000 fee-free ATMs nationwide—more than the top three U.S. banks combined. They also offer digital banking, wire transfers (domestic and international), Zelle transfers, and mortgage specialist appointments. The website highlights special offerings including support for new Ukrainian immigrants who can open accounts with a Ukrainian travel passport, and recently increased certificate rates with a 5-month no-penalty special certificate at 3.75% APY.

As a credit union, Selfreliance operates on member-ownership principles rather than shareholder profit maximization. However, membership eligibility and specific terms are not detailed on the provided website content. Their rates are competitive but subject to credit approval and individual creditworthiness assessment. The company positions savings comparisons against national averages from Bankrate as of January 2, 2026.
services: Mortgage specialist consultation and appointment scheduling
pros: Extensive ATM network with 85,000+ fee-free ATMs—claimed to exceed top three U.S. banks combined
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 4.69% APR for 2024+ vehicles
10% down mortgage option with no PMI for first-time homebuyers plus one-time free rate adjustment
Competitive credit card rates at 9.90% APR compared to 19.72% average bank rate
High-yield certificate rates up to 3.75% APY on 5-month term
International and domestic wire transfer services available
Digital banking, Zelle transfers, and mortgage specialist appointments
cons: No information provided on membership eligibility criteria or how to qualify as a member
Rates require credit approval and vary based on individual creditworthiness—advertised rates may not apply to all applicants
Mortgage savings examples based on excellent credit profiles; actual results vary with market conditions
Website does not disclose annual fees, minimum balance requirements, or other account terms
best_for: Credit union members seeking competitive rates on mortgages and auto loans
First-time homebuyers looking for low-down-payment mortgage options without PMI
Consumers nationwide seeking fee-free ATM access and digital banking convenience
diagnosis: Selfreliance Federal Credit Union is best for existing or eligible members seeking competitive consumer banking and lending products with nationwide ATM access. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility is not detailed on their website, and advertised rates require individual credit approval—actual rates and terms will vary based on creditworthiness and loan specifics.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
